response: Data collection begins with identifying sources where data can be gathered from various populations. Data analysis is essential to interpret the data accurately and identify trends. Data entry requires careful handling to ensure data consistency and accuracy. Data validation ensures that data remains reliable and free from errors. Data storage must be secure to protect the data from unauthorized access. Data sharing is important for collaborative research using the data. Data interpretation involves examining the data to draw meaningful conclusions. Data reporting ensures that the data is presented clearly and effectively.
